notes: Prompt overrides for tracks that need regeneration based on listening feedback. These are intended to replace or extend each track's sonicBrief in packages/catalog/data/catalog/manifest.json.

tracks.title: Afterglow
tracks.prompt: Warm synthwave cooldown vocal track. Reduce mainstream pop gloss: no contemporary pop drop, no radio-pop clap stack, no EDM pop chorus. Use analog pads, restrained gated drums, soft arpeggio, intimate breathy vocal, sunset afterglow mix.

tracks.title: District Lights
tracks.prompt: Energetic house vocal party track. Enforce strict 4/4 four-on-the-floor kick from the first groove through the chorus. Steady house pulse, rolling bassline, bright hats, neon arpeggio hook, compact chorus-led arrangement. No broken beat, no halftime, no loose shuffle.

tracks.title: Last Platform
tracks.prompt: Mellow overnight jazztronica instrumental. Increase jazz harmony: extended Rhodes voicings, ii-V color, 7th/9th/13th chords, tasteful chord substitutions, restrained bass, brushed electronic drums, distant train ambience, whisper-level hook.

tracks.title: Daydream Wash
tracks.prompt: Warm Y2K k-pop chill instrumental. Clean dry pop mix with no lo-fi room reverb and no washed-out ambience. Soft pop drums, close gentle pluck, warm pads, clear hook, cozy but polished fade.

tracks.title: Wireframe Rush
tracks.prompt: Focused but aggressive mecha anime-rock instrumental. Sharper distorted guitar riff, heavier rock drums, harder orchestral hits, urgent synth pulse, forward attack, no soft background feel, still structured for focus.

tracks.title: Cowbell Crest
tracks.prompt: Energetic drift phonk gym instrumental. Add loud piercing Roland-style cowbell lead as the main hook, distorted 808 bass, dark trap hats, gritty clipping, hairpin-turn tension, athletic drive, cowbell must cut through the mix.

tracks.title: Bell Hammer
tracks.prompt: Euphoric warehouse phonk party instrumental. Remove all traditional acoustic or folk elements. Use only electronic phonk textures, maximum cowbell, crushed 808 drop, rave synth stabs, fast trap hats, peak rave aggression.

tracks.title: After Hours Bell
tracks.prompt: Warm low-energy phonk chill instrumental. Reduce dark and eerie tone: soft cowbell, warm 808 hum, gentle tape color, relaxed post-rave calm. No horror ambience, no ominous drones, no scary industrial darkness.

tracks.title: Neuro Fade
tracks.prompt: Calm DnB study instrumental with increased breakbeat density. Layered amen edits, detailed ghost snares, tighter percussion micro-variations, soft sub pulse, low-distraction mix, no harsh neuro stabs, headphone-intimate fade.
